positive: A highly detailed, central composition illustration of a mystical celestial map merging with geometric floral patterns. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes of stylized moons, stars, planets, and vibrant, intricate flora like mandalas and stylized peacock feathers. The artwork must feature strong cosmic contrasts, utilizing deep sapphire blues, electric violets, rich emerald greens, and metallic gold accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric linework, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Composition must be symmetrical and self-contained, designed to look excellent as a full-chest apparel graphic. Highly detailed vector illustration, maximalist yet clean.
negative: blurry, ugly, deformed, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy lines, watercolor, photorealistic, 3d render
